meta.title: Zero Trust Applications For The Grid
meta.description: David Lawrence of Duke Energy talks about how they are implementing zero-trust applications, particularly on their newer microgrids. He goes into detail on an actual system, design criteria, and how they secured it. It's a must watch if you are in the electric sector and interesting to all.
